props.title: New Article: Nobody Indexes a Simulation

props.text: Search engines crawl blog posts, product pages, recipes — but not simulations. MiroShark just shipped a sitemap (PR #82) and filtered RSS feeds (PR #81), making every public simulation crawlable by Google and subscribable in any feed reader. Combined with embed codes, social cards, citation keys, and Jupyter export, MiroShark is treating simulations as a web content type — addressable, permanent, discoverable.
